item.title: Exploring Under the Thames Pier
item.description: A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: Exploring Under the Thames Pier
media:content.media:description: A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: What We Found Tells an Amazing Story
item.description: We’ve chanced upon a rather remarkable medal featuring what looks like a prayer. It is a proper bit of history that has turned up, suggesting a deeply personal story behind it. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: What We Found Tells an Amazing Story
media:content.media:description: We’ve chanced upon a rather remarkable medal featuring what looks like a prayer. It is a proper bit of history that has turned up, suggesting a deeply personal story behind it. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: Mudlarking Surprises by the River
item.description: A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: Mudlarking Surprises by the River
media:content.media:description: A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: Discoveries Along the Thames
item.description: A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: Discoveries Along the Thames
media:content.media:description: A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: An Exciting Thames Find To Add To My Collection
item.description: How can a Thames find be ugly and beautiful at the same time!? Have a think and see if you can get the answer right before you watch this video! This one is probably the best one yet in my growing collection. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: An Exciting Thames Find To Add To My Collection
media:content.media:description: How can a Thames find be ugly and beautiful at the same time!? Have a think and see if you can get the answer right before you watch this video! This one is probably the best one yet in my growing collection. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: Unusual And Mysterious Finds: An Engraved Ring
item.description: We’ve found a ring featuring some engravings. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: Unusual And Mysterious Finds: An Engraved Ring
media:content.media:description: We’ve found a ring featuring some engravings. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: I Found All Of This In The River Thames!
item.description: An incredible find uncovered from the silt. A piece of historic chainmail is recovered, offering a direct link to ancient defensive armor. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: I Found All Of This In The River Thames!
media:content.media:description: An incredible find uncovered from the silt. A piece of historic chainmail is recovered, offering a direct link to ancient defensive armor. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.
